description: Expand a collapsed view branch in the agent context.

inputFields.name: selector
inputFields.description: Stable selector for the collapsed view node to expand.

description: Collapse a previously expanded view branch in the agent context.

inputFields.name: selector
inputFields.description: Stable selector for the view node to collapse.

description: Set the configured visibility of a view.

inputFields.name: selector
inputFields.description: Stable selector for the view whose visibility should change.

inputFields.name: visibility
inputFields.description: Whether the view should be visible.

description: Clear the visibility override for a view.

inputFields.name: selector
inputFields.description: Stable selector for the view whose override should be cleared.

description: Resolve a selection aggregation candidate into an `AttributeIdentifier` for intent actions, plus a short preview.

inputFields.name: candidateId
inputFields.description: Stable identifier for the selected candidate row.

inputFields.name: aggregation
inputFields.description: Aggregation op to apply to the candidate field.

description: Execute a provenance-changing intent program with one or more ordered steps.
